title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.720 - Punishment when convicted of misdemeanor
text:
351.720.  Punishment when convicted of misdemeanor. — Any person convicted of a misdemeanor for violation of any of the provisions of this chapter shall be punished by a fine of not less than one hundred dollars nor more than one thousand dollars, or by imprisonment in the county jail for a term of not less than thirty days nor more than six months, or by both such fine and imprisonment.
(RSMo 1939 § 5112, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 134) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4640; 1919 § 9834
